query: Paramount Games Studio launch date Skydance Interactive New Media

mako.raw:
{"query":"Paramount Games Studio launch date Skydance Interactive New Media","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1782,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://skydance.com/games/","title":"Games - Skydance Media","content":"Encompassing each of the company’s two gaming studios—one led by Dan Prigg (Skydance’s BEHEMOTH, The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners) and the other led by Amy Hennig & Julian Beak (Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra, Untitled Lucasfilm Game)— as well as its games publishing, interactive licensing and transmedia storytelling teams, Skydance Games brings to life one-of-a-kind worlds and crafts compelling stories that players want to revisit over and over again."},{"url":"https://www.vgchartz.com/article/468057/paramount-skydance-launches-paramount-games-studio/","title":"Paramount Skydance Launches Paramount Games Studio","content":"Paramount Skydance has announced (via Variety) Paramount Games Studio, a unified video game studio that combines Skydance's two existing game studios, Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media.
Paramount Games Studio will announce its first game, which will be a AAA title, during Summer Game Fest later today.
Skydance New Media's Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra and an untitled Star Wars game are still in development.
Julian Beak, the other co-president of New Media, has left the company.
Maluigi (on 06 June 2026)"},{"url":"https://www.gamespress.com/PARAMOUNT-GAMES-STUDIO-REVEALS-A-BLOCKBUSTER-LINEUP-OF-FAN-EXPERIENCES","title":""PARAMOUNT GAMES STUDIO REVEALS A BLOCKBUSTER LINEUP OF FAN EXPERIENCES FOR SAN DIEGO COMIC-CON 2026" - Games Press","content":"10 hours ago — Friday, July 24, from 10 - 11 AM PT. Established in 2026, Paramount Games Studio is a unified gaming studio, encompassing Skydance Games as its ...
LOS ANGELES (July 17, 2026) – Paramount Games Studio today unveiled its slate of fan experiences, exclusive reveals, and hands-on gameplay opportunities for San Diego Comic-Con 2026, taking place on July 23 to 26 at the San Diego Convention Center.
Other Paramount Games Studio activations can be found sprinkled around the convention at the Paramount+ Lodge, the IGN Gaming Lounge, and other locations.
IGN Gaming Lounge – Play Avatar Legends™: The Fighting Game at one of 25 demo stations featured in IGN's Gaming Lounge, with daily tournaments, giveaways, and more.
Friday evening will feature a special invite-only event for the Star Trek Fleet Command community.
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin Training Day Signing – Visit the IDW Booth #2729 to meet Attack Peter, Escorza Bros, Tom Waltz, Luis Delgado, Ben Bishop, and Shawn Kittelsen for autographs on Friday, July 24, from 5 PM to 6 PM.
For more information on AVATAR LEGENDS™: The Fighting Game, join the conversation on X and Instagram.
For ongoing updates on game releases and expanded transmedia experiences, follow Paramount Games on social media: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, and Facebook.
Its portfolio spans console, PC, mobile, and emerging platforms, with upcoming games and franchise experiences including Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin, AVATAR LEGENDS™: The Fighting Game, and Star Trek: Shadow Frontier."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/06/paramount-video-games-new-studio-1236942484/","title":"Paramount Reboots Video Game Strategy, Forming New Studio","content":"Paramount is reconstituting its video game operation, launching a new game studio and setting a leadership team for the division.
Other key execs in the gaming unit include Dan Prigg, EVP and head of games; Shawn Kittelsen, SVP, head of creative and production; Andrea Silvers, SVP, marketing and communications; Kara Bilkiss, SVP, business development and licensing; and Ray Davis, SVP of engineering.
Variety first reported on the studio launch."}]}

The new division combines Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media.","score":0.8812988,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://lamag.com/media/paramount-skydance-launches-new-in-house-games-studio-amid-pending-warner-bros-discovery-merger-deal","title":"Paramount Skydance Launches New In-House Games Studio Amid Pending Warner Bros. Discovery Merger Deal","content":"# Paramount Skydance Launches New In-House Games Studio Amid Pending Warner Bros. Paramount Games Studio will be developing games based on existing Paramount IP and franchises, as well as based on original content. announced June 5 that it will combine Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media into Paramount Games Studio, allowing Paramount to create games from its intellectual property in-house instead of licensing its content to third-party developers. As first reported by Variety, Paramount Games Studio will be headed by Tony Driscoll, who also serves as head of corporate strategy and development of Paramount Skydance. Paramount Chief Executive Officer David Ellison announced at Summer Game Fest in L.A. on June 5 that they’ll be developing a new game, “Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin,” according to Variety. Before the announcement, Skydance New Media also had already been working on “Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra” and an untitled “Star Wars” game in collaboration with Lucasfilm, according to Variety.","score":0.8464638,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/p/DZT9LxTtqW0","title":"Paramount Skydance has officially launched Paramount Games Studio ...","content":"blancotarantinotv on June 7, 2026: \"Paramount Skydance has officially launched Paramount Games Studio, replacing its former Skydance gaming","score":0.82728493,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/Paramount_Games_Studio","title":"Paramount Games Studio - Wookieepedia - Fandom","content":"On June 5, 2026, it was announced that Skydance New Media was being merged with her sister studio, Skydance Interactive, to form a new entity: Paramount Games","score":0.81524754,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/articles/paramount-skydance-announces-paramount-games-175624268.html","title":"Paramount Skydance Announces Paramount Games Studio","content":"Paramount Skydance Announces Paramount Games Studio Michael Walsh Fri, June 5, 2026 at 10:56 AM PDT.
